content:
My account somehow got bugged, possibly due to Traphase and now I'm unable to play the game. 
I try to log into the game from both PC and phone and both have the same problem. After clicking to log into the game, it gets stuck at the login screen, all the icons on the right disappear but the game never loads and it stays with the login screen forever.
It likely has something to do with Traphase, because the issue started after I cancelled a Traphase queue and it wouldn't cancel it, so I eventually closed the game. Then I logged back in and started playing DZone and some time later (more than an hour) I got a Traphase match screen in the middle of my DZone battle, then it went to a black screen saying trying to connect to network, even though I had no network issues.
The whole day yesterday it would directly go to that black connection screen after trying to log in, and today it just stays at the login screen instead.
It definitely seems the issue is with my account and not the game itself, because repair didn't help and also because the issue is the same with PC and phone.
thread_title: ✅「Resolved」Account bugged and unable to load into the game after login

content: 命輪自動疊位的現在，從兌換所、活動等途徑取得的命輪都不會出現全螢幕畫面了，很多命輪除了第一次拿到的時候再也看不到全圖，就」在疊位畫面展示的圖也比喚醒畫面小很多看不到細節並且看不到命輪作業轉動時的前後景立體效果，好可惜啊，請快點開放從典藏館瀏覽命輪吧🥺
thread_title: 何時會開啟典藏館的命輪部分？
